labels.analysis: The MCP Server "TaScan" provides 28 tools focused on productivity tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: tascan_list_projects, tascan_create_project, tascan_get_project, tascan_update_project, tascan_delete_project.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Productivity" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: task, project, timer.

tools.name: tascan_list_projects
tools.description: List all TaScan projects in the organization

tools.name: tascan_create_project
tools.description: Create a new TaScan project (top-level container for events)

tools.name: tascan_get_project
tools.description: Get details of a specific project

tools.name: tascan_update_project
tools.description: Update a project (name, location, status, dates)

tools.name: tascan_delete_project
tools.description: Delete a project and all its events, tasks, and completions. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: tascan_create_event
tools.description: Create a new event (task list) within a project

tools.name: tascan_list_events
tools.description: List all events (task lists) within a project

tools.name: tascan_get_event
tools.description: Get details of a specific event (task list) including its tasks

tools.name: tascan_update_event
tools.description: Update an event / task list (name, description, team_mode, timer_mode)

tools.name: tascan_delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event (task list) and all its tasks and completions. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: tascan_add_tasks
tools.description: Add one or more tasks to an event (task list). Supports bulk creation. IMPORTANT: Set response_type correctly — use "text" for info collection (names, phones, emails, notes), "photo" for visual verification (inspections, serial numbers, damage checks), "checkbox" only for simple confirmations.

response_type.description: CRITICAL: "text" for names, phones, emails, notes, addresses, any free-form input. "photo" for tasks needing photographic proof (inspections, serial numbers, packed cases). "checkbox" ONLY for simple yes/no confirmations. "number" for numeric values. "date" for dates. "choice" for multiple-choice (needs response_config.options). Most info-collection tasks should be "text", most verification tasks should be "photo".

tools.name: tascan_list_tasks
tools.description: List all tasks in an event (task list)

tools.name: tascan_get_task
tools.description: Get details of a specific task including completions

tools.name: tascan_update_task
tools.description: Update a task (title, description, response_type, flags, sort_order)

response_type.description: See tascan_add_tasks for guidance. "text" for info collection, "photo" for visual proof, "checkbox" for yes/no only.

tools.name: tascan_delete_task
tools.description: Delete a specific task and its completions. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: tascan_complete_task
tools.description: Complete a task on behalf of a worker. Inserts a completion record and timer event. Use this to simulate or record task completions via the API.

tools.name: tascan_list_workers
tools.description: List all workers (taskees) in the organization

tools.name: tascan_create_worker
tools.description: Create a new worker (taskee) in the organization

tools.name: tascan_update_worker
tools.description: Update a worker profile (name, phone, email)

tools.name: tascan_generate_qr
tools.description: Generate a QR code for a task list (event) that workers can scan to access tasks

tools.name: tascan_apply_template
tools.description: Apply a pre-built template to a task list, adding all template tasks

tools.name: tascan_list_templates
tools.description: List available task templates (built-in and saved)

tools.name: tascan_get_report
tools.description: Get completion report for a task list (event) including task status, completions, workers, and photos

tools.name: tascan_list_issues
tools.description: List all issues for a task list (event). Returns open, acknowledged, and resolved issues with severity, type, and category. Use this to discover issues that need AI analysis via tascan_analyze_issue.

tools.name: tascan_analyze_issue
tools.description: Step 1 of the Closed-Loop Autonomous Operations Protocol. Retrieves full issue context including worker info, message thread, project history, and recent similar issues. Use this data to reason about the root cause and generate a remediation plan. Also supports server-side AI analysis via POST (calls Anthropic API directly).

server_side_ai.description: If true, the server calls Anthropic API directly for AI analysis (default: false — returns raw data for MCP client to analyze)

tools.name: tascan_recommend_fix
tools.description: Step 2 of the Closed-Loop Autonomous Operations Protocol. Post an AI-generated recommendation to an issue thread. Accepts both a text recommendation and an optional structured_recommendation object with task definitions for auto-dispatch. The recommendation is persisted in the AI audit trail.

issue_id.description: Issue ID to recommend a fix for

recommendation.description: The AI-generated recommendation text (clear, actionable instructions)

structured_recommendation.description: Optional structured recommendation with tasks for auto-dispatch. Format: { recommendation_summary, confidence_score, tasks: [{ title, description, response_type, requires_photo, is_safety_checkpoint, sort_order }], estimated_duration_minutes, required_responder_role }

ai_agent.description: Name of the AI agent posting (default: TaScan AI)

tools.name: tascan_dispatch_instruction
tools.description: Step 3 of the Closed-Loop Autonomous Operations Protocol. Dispatches remediation to the worker via MULTI-CHANNEL delivery: (1) issue thread message, (2) in-app notification, (3) progress feed update, (4) SMS if phone on file, (5) optional remediation task list creation. Closes the loop from digital AI analysis to physical worker execution.

issue_id.description: Issue ID this instruction relates to

instruction.description: Clear, actionable instruction for the worker to execute

worker_id.description: Target worker ID (defaults to the worker who reported the issue)

remediation_tasks.description: Optional array of tasks to create as a remediation task list. Each: { title, description, response_type, requires_photo, is_safety_checkpoint, sort_order }

recommendation_summary.description: One-line summary for the task list description

send_sms.description: Send SMS to worker (default: true if phone on file)

ai_agent.description: Name of the AI agent dispatching (default: TaScan AI)

tools.name: tascan_auto_resolve
tools.description: FULL Closed-Loop Autonomous Operations Protocol in one call. Server-side AI analyzes the issue, generates remediation tasks, creates a task list, and dispatches to the worker — all without human intervention. This executes Patent Claim 7: autonomous operations from issue detection through physical-world instruction delivery.
